title: 白玉的幻梦 Dream of Hakugyokurou
description:
The rain curtain shrouded the Lotus Land and also concealed the surging undercurrents.
This mysterious event has put the entire Lotus Land in a predicament.
Many people try to solve the problem but never achieve results.
In the Hakugyokurou, the two people waiting quietly also fell into worry.
One day, Yuyuko disappeared from the Hakugyokurou, and the gardener Konpaku Youmu also encountered a strange event.
So she embarked on a journey to search for Youyou and investigate the mutation.

游戏特色：

• don't know 东方projects can also experience fun

• Turn based combat with sufficient decision-making time

• Always fighting alone

• Different from the character growth method of "gaining experience and level up"

• Explore Lotus Land and defeat familiar characters whose minds are affected

• Three different endings

The game save location is [game folder]\www\save
description_short: In the Lotus Land, endless rain began to fall, and fewer acquaintances could be seen on the streets. However, strange events remained unresolved for a long time. At this moment, Yuyuko disappeared......
